cli.unreachable_error: Could not reach {url}: {detail}. That's finding #1 for your report -- an unreachable site loses every visitor, not just some.

report.tagline: Turn any bad website into your next client.
report.cover_prepared_by: Prepared by Zero Digit X - Mario Alvarez
report.exec_summary_critical_sentence: {critical} critical issue(s) and {warning} warning(s) are costing you customers right now.
report.exec_summary_all_good_sentence: No critical issues found -- this site is in solid shape. The notes below are opportunities to polish it further.
report.exec_summary_intro: This report scans your website the way a customer -- and Google -- actually experiences it, and translates every technical issue into plain business terms.
report.section_why_it_matters: Why it matters to your business
report.footer_generated_by: Generated by Zero Digit X - Mario Alvarez with pitch-doctor

load_speed.name: Mobile Load Speed
load_speed.impact_critical: Your site takes {seconds}s to show anything on a phone -- more than half of visitors leave before seeing it.
load_speed.impact_warning: Your site takes {seconds}s to show anything on a phone. Every extra second past 3 quietly costs you visitors.
load_speed.impact_ok: Your site shows content in {seconds}s on a phone -- fast enough to keep visitors around.
load_speed.found_critical: Time until visible content appeared, on a simulated mid-range mobile connection: {seconds} seconds.
load_speed.found_warning: Time until visible content appeared, on a simulated mid-range mobile connection: {seconds} seconds.
load_speed.found_ok: Time until visible content appeared, on a simulated mid-range mobile connection: {seconds} seconds.
load_speed.benefit: A faster site keeps more visitors on the page long enough to call, book, or buy -- instead of hitting the back button.

ssl.name: SSL / HTTPS Security
ssl.impact_critical: Chrome and Safari tell your customers this site is "Not Secure" -- a red flag for anyone about to share a phone number, email, or card.
ssl.impact_warning: Your HTTPS setup has issues that can trigger security warnings for some visitors.
ssl.impact_ok: Your site uses HTTPS, so browsers show the secure padlock customers expect.
ssl.found_critical: No valid SSL certificate was found. {detail}
ssl.found_warning: SSL is present but flagged an issue. {detail}
ssl.found_ok: A valid SSL certificate is installed and HTTPS is enforced.
ssl.benefit: A secure padlock keeps cautious visitors from bouncing before they even read your page.
ssl.detail_no_https: The site does not use HTTPS at all.

mobile_rendering.name: Mobile Rendering
mobile_rendering.impact_critical: Your site doesn't fit phone screens properly -- text or buttons get cut off, or visitors must scroll sideways to read it. Most of your visitors are on a phone right now.
mobile_rendering.impact_warning: Your site mostly works on phones but has minor layout issues that make it feel unpolished.
mobile_rendering.impact_ok: Your site adapts cleanly to phone screens.
mobile_rendering.found_critical: Detected rendering problems on a 390x844 mobile viewport: {issues}.
mobile_rendering.found_warning: Detected minor rendering issues on a 390x844 mobile viewport: {issues}.
mobile_rendering.found_ok: The page rendered cleanly at both mobile (390x844) and desktop (1440x900) viewports.
mobile_rendering.benefit: A phone-friendly layout means visitors can actually read your menu, prices, or booking form without pinching and zooming.
mobile_rendering.issue_viewport: no mobile viewport tag, so phones render it like a shrunken desktop page
mobile_rendering.issue_overflow: content overflows {px}px past the screen edge, forcing sideways scrolling

outdated_signals.name: Outdated Content Signals
outdated_signals.impact_critical: Your footer still says {year} -- customers wonder if you're still in business or if anyone's updated this site in years.
outdated_signals.impact_warning: Your footer date is a little behind, which can make an otherwise fine site look neglected.
outdated_signals.impact_ok: Your site doesn't show any obviously outdated dates.
outdated_signals.found_critical: Found a copyright year of {year} in the footer.
outdated_signals.found_warning: Found a copyright year of {year} in the footer.
outdated_signals.found_ok: No stale copyright year detected in the footer.
outdated_signals.benefit: An up-to-date footer quietly signals "we're open, active, and paying attention" to every visitor.

broken_links.name: Broken Links
broken_links.impact_critical: {count} link(s) on your site lead to dead pages. Each one is a visitor who hit a wall instead of finding what they needed.
broken_links.impact_warning: {count} link(s) on your site lead to dead pages -- worth a quick cleanup.
broken_links.impact_ok: All checked internal links are working.
broken_links.found_critical: Checked {checked} internal links; {count} returned a broken status: {examples}.
broken_links.found_warning: Checked {checked} internal links; {count} returned a broken status: {examples}.
broken_links.found_ok: Checked {checked} internal links; none were broken.
broken_links.benefit: Fixing broken links means visitors -- and Google -- can actually get where they're trying to go on your site.

contact_friction.name: Contact Friction
contact_friction.impact_critical: Visitors can see your phone number but can't tap it to call, or can't easily find an email or address -- on mobile that's often the difference between a customer calling and giving up.
contact_friction.impact_warning: Contacting your business takes a little more effort than it should for a visitor on their phone.
contact_friction.impact_ok: Visitors can easily call, email, or find your business from any page.
contact_friction.found_ok: Phone numbers are tappable and contact information is easy to find.
contact_friction.benefit: Tap-to-call links and clear contact info turn casual visitors into phone calls and emails.
contact_friction.issue_phone_not_tappable: phone number shown as plain text, not a tappable tel: link
contact_friction.issue_no_email: no visible email or contact link
contact_friction.issue_no_address: no physical address found on the page

search_visibility.name: Search Visibility Basics
search_visibility.impact_critical: Your site is missing basic information Google needs to show it in local search results -- you may be invisible to people searching nearby for what you offer.
search_visibility.impact_warning: Your site is missing some search-visibility basics that make it easier for Google to recommend you.
search_visibility.impact_ok: The basics Google looks for (title, description, social preview, structured data) are all in place.
search_visibility.found_ok: Title, meta description, Open Graph tags, favicon, and structured data were all found.
search_visibility.benefit: Fixing these basics helps your business actually show up -- and look good -- when nearby customers search for what you offer.
search_visibility.issue_og: missing Open Graph tags (used for link previews on Facebook/WhatsApp)
search_visibility.issue_structured_data: no LocalBusiness structured data (JSON-LD) for Google

reachability.name: Reachability & Uptime
reachability.impact_critical: Your website could not be reached at all during this scan. Anyone clicking your Google listing or a shared link right now is hitting an error instead of your business.
reachability.impact_warning: Your site loads, but redirects or address inconsistencies add friction and can confuse search engines.
reachability.impact_ok: Your site resolves cleanly with no unnecessary redirects.
reachability.found_ok: DNS resolves, the site responded with status {status}, and there are no problematic redirects.
reachability.benefit: A reliably reachable site is the bare minimum for not losing customers before they even see your pitch.
reachability.detail_unreachable: The site could not be reached: {error}
reachability.detail_dns_failure: DNS did not resolve for this domain.
reachability.detail_redirect_chain: The site redirects through {hops} hops before it finishes loading.
reachability.detail_www_mismatch: The www and non-www versions of the domain behave inconsistently.
